meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Motorola repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Motorola Phone Repair Winnipeg | Screen & Battery Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Affordable Motorola repair in Winnipeg. Screen, battery, charging port repair for Moto G, Edge, Razr & all models. Budget-friendly same-day service.
page.h1: Affordable Motorola Phone Repairs in Winnipeg
page.heroDescription: From budget-friendly Moto G and E series to premium Edge flagships and foldable Razr devices, we repair all Motorola phones in Winnipeg.

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Moto G, Edge OLED, and Razr foldable screen replacements.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Motorola batteries degrade after 2-3 years. Same-day replacement to restore full-day battery life.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: USB-C charging port repair for all Moto devices.

services.name: Camera Repair
services.description: Fix blurry photos, cracked lenses, and autofocus issues on Moto G, Edge, and Razr cameras.

services.name: Speaker Repair
services.description: Speaker, earpiece, and microphone repairs for all Motorola phones.

services.name: Connectivity Issues
services.description: WiFi, Bluetooth, and cellular antenna repairs.

advantage_pillars.title: Budget-Friendly Repairs
advantage_pillars.description: Motorola parts are often more affordable than other brands.

advantage_pillars.title: Razr Foldable Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: We repair Motorola Razr foldables including screen, hinge, and flex cable issues.

advantage_pillars.title: Same-Day Moto Service
advantage_pillars.description: Most Motorola repairs completed same day—typically 1-2 hours.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs.

models_description: We service all Motorola devices from the budget-friendly Moto E to the premium Edge series and foldable Razr.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Motorola repair costs vary by model—budget Moto G and E series are very affordable, while Edge flagships and Razr foldables cost more. Motorola's official support centre provides troubleshooting guides.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Moto G repairs are often surprisingly affordable, but Razr foldable screens can approach flagship pricing. iFixit's Motorola Razr teardowns illustrate why foldable repairs are significantly more complex.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: For budget Motorola devices, repair almost always makes sense. For Razr foldables, we'll explain the costs clearly.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair doesn't make sense, data recovery is often still possible.

faqs.question: How much does Motorola screen repair cost in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Motorola repairs are often more affordable than Samsung or Apple. Moto G screens are budget-friendly, while Edge and Razr cost more.

faqs.question: Do you repair Motorola Razr foldable phones?
faqs.answer: Yes! We're one of few Winnipeg shops that repair Razr foldables.

faqs.question: How long does Motorola repair take?
faqs.answer: Most Motorola repairs are completed same-day, typically within 1-2 hours.

faqs.question: Is it worth repairing my Moto G or Moto E?
faqs.answer: Often yes! Moto G and E repairs are very affordable.

faqs.question: Do you stock Motorola parts in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: We stock common Moto G and Edge series parts. Razr parts may require 1-2 days.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB. Walk-ins welcome or book online.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

cta.smsMessage: Hi, I found your site searching for Motorola repair. Can you help?

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
